title: Senior Financial Analyst - Cholamandalam Finance - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Cholamandalam Finance - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Cholamandalam Finance in Pimpri-Chinchwad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Cholamandalam Finance:
Cholamandalam Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Risk Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cholamandalam Finance!
